calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2004 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement Conference.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: K T Anderson, also present.
Defendant Theodore Hunt present in pro per.
Parties settled and have enter into a Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.
Terms read on the record as follows:
Judgment for restitution and possession of the premises located at 98 Kelloch Ave., San Francisco. Writ to be issued and shall be stayed until April 25, 2004. Per diem damages from 12-6-03 through 4-25-04 in total of $9,465.72, Defendant waives his right to any stay.
No one else calim a right to possession, any property left is to be disposed off.
If Defendant vacates on or before 4-25-04 and fulfils each of the agreed upon terms of the Judgment, and prepare all documents necessary to vacate Juegment, then Plaintiff shall file a dismissal with prejudice.
Parties mutually release each other from all claims.
Each agreed to terms in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff
K.T. Anderson, Plaintiff
Theodore Hunt, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case did not settle. Jury Trial remains for April 12, 2004.
Parties waive court reporter.

JPT: Irving Pfeffer (304B) Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter
